slides.title: Estrogen was *quietly protecting* you.
slides.sub: As it falls in perimenopause, bone, heart and muscle change faster. Here is how to defend them.

slides.title: Estrogen does more than fertility
slides.body: For decades estrogen helped guard your *bones, heart and muscle*. As it declines, those systems lose a long-standing ally.

slides.title: Bone loss can speed up
slides.body: Falling estrogen is linked to faster bone loss in the years around menopause. Strength training *can support* bone density.

slides.title: The heart needs attention
slides.body: Heart risk tends to rise after menopause. Movement, blood pressure and cholesterol checks *become more important* now, not less.

slides.title: Muscle is your insurance
slides.body: Lower estrogen can make muscle harder to keep. Lifting two or three times a week *helps protect* strength and metabolism.

slides.title: Timely care matters
slides.body: Symptoms are worth raising early. A clinician can discuss options that *may help* protect bone, heart and quality of life.

slides.title: Protect the systems estrogen *used to guard*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your sleep, food, movement and steps, turning the habits that protect bone, heart and muscle into one daily Health Score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Perimenopause isn't just hot flashes. As estrogen falls, your bones, heart and muscle lose a quiet protector. 🌿

Strength training, heart checks and timely care can defend the systems estrogen used to guard. Save this for later. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those daily habits into one simple score → link in bio.
